expectations.text: Correctly identifies IG2 (not just IG1) for the accounting firm
expectations.evidence: Incorrectly recommends IG1 — overlooks that dedicated IT responsibility and sensitive financial data push to IG2

expectations.text: Explains the three IG criteria used to determine the Implementation Group
expectations.evidence: Lists IG criteria: resource capacity, data sensitivity, regulatory obligations

expectations.text: Recommends starting with Controls 1-2 (asset and software inventory)
expectations.evidence: Starts with inventory, patching, and account hygiene

expectations.text: Identifies MFA on Microsoft 365 as an immediate priority action
expectations.evidence: Recommends MFA on M365 via Entra ID Conditional Access as top priority

expectations.text: Mentions regulatory exposure (FTC Safeguards Rule or equivalent) driving security requirements
expectations.evidence: Does not cite specific regulations (FTC Safeguards Rule or IRS Pub 4557)
